sqlCommand.descr: delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt3 = 0
insert into TransX (KeyID,Co, Crcy, GL, Amt3) (Select KeyID + '-data2', Co, Crcy, GL, Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' )
update TransX set GL = substring(GL,1,5) + '02' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '359%00'
update TransX set GL = substring(GL,1,5) + '00' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '%9901'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL < '2999999' and not GL like '%96' and not GL like '%98'
update TransX set GL = Descr from TransX inner join Misc_Tables on GL = ID where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Table_ID = 'ElimGLmap3' and substring(GL,1,2) in ('13','16','18','20','21','22')
update TransX set GL = Descr from TransX inner join Misc_Tables on GL = ID where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Table_ID = 'ElimGLmap6' and Field1 = 'AtoC'
insert into TransX (KeyID, Crcy, GL, TP, Amt3) (Select KeyID,Crcy,GL, '2001' as TP,round(-sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Crcy, GL)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (not Co is NULL or Amt3 = 0)
insert into TransX (KeyID, Crcy, GL, TP, Amt3) (Select KeyID, Crcy, GL, '' as TP, -Amt3 as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]')
update TransX set TTY = '', BusCat = '30' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL > '4000000'
update TransX set GL = substring(GL,1,3) + '0000' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '%9900' and TP = ''

insert into TransX (KeyID, Crcy, GL, TP, Amt3, TTY, BusCat) (Select KeyID,Crcy,substring(Descr,1,3) + substring(GL,4,4) as GL, TP, -Amt3 as Amt3, Field2 as TTY, BusCat from TransX inner join Misc_Tables on substring(GL,1,3) = substring(ID,1,3) where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Table_ID = 'ElimGLmap5' and Field1 = '30')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Crcy, GL, TP, Amt3, TTY, BusCat) (Select KeyID, Crcy, '151' + substring(GL,4,4) as GL, TP, Amt3, '831' as TTY, BusCat from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '401%')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Crcy, GL, TP, Amt3, TTY, BusCat) (Select KeyID, Crcy, '151' + substring(GL,4,4) as GL, TP, -Amt3 as Amt3, '832' as TTY,BusCat from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '401%')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Crcy, GL, TP, Amt3, TTY,BusCat) (Select KeyID, Crcy, '142' + substring(GL,4,4) as GL, TP, Amt3, '824' as TTY,BusCat from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,1,2) in ('50','51','52'))

insert into TransX (KeyID, Crcy, GL, TP, Amt3, TTY,BusCat) (Select KeyID, Crcy, '142' + substring(GL,4,4) as GL, TP, -Amt3, '822' as TTY,BusCat from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,1,2) in ('50','51','52'))

update TransX set Co = '3030', PC = '3991051101', Contract = (case when TP = '' then 'non-FIRV' else 'FIRV' end), Txt = 'FIRV LB-Newline true-up', GLdesc = '', Stat = '', CatCode = '', PTF = '', Flex6 = '', Amt1 = 0, Amt2 = 0, Amt4 = 0, Amt5 = 0, Amt6 = ABS(Amt3) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set ProdCode = '', UWYR = '', AccYr = '', ReinLoc = '', RiskTerr = '', Broker = '', ReinName = '', TransCode = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set BusCat = '' from TransX inner join [GFS].dbo.FSGValidation on GL = GLAccount where KeyID = '[batchID]' and ReinsType = 0
update TransX set ProdCode = 'UNKNOWN' from TransX inner join [GFS].dbo.FSGValidation on GL = GLAccount where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Product = 1
update TransX set UWYR = '[year]' from TransX inner join [GFS].dbo.FSGValidation on GL = GLAccount where KeyID = '[batchID]' and UWYear = 1
update TransX set AccYr = '[year]' from TransX inner join [GFS].dbo.FSGValidation on GL = GLAccount where KeyID = '[batchID]' and AccidentYear = 1
update TransX set ReinLoc = 'UNKN' from TransX inner join [GFS].dbo.FSGValidation on GL = GLAccount where KeyID = '[batchID]' and InsurerLocation = 1
update TransX set RiskTerr = 'UNKN' from TransX inner join [GFS].dbo.FSGValidation on GL = GLAccount where KeyID = '[batchID]' and RiskLocation = 1
update TransX set Broker = 'UNKNOWN' from TransX t inner join [GFS].dbo.FSGValidation v on GL = GLAccount where KeyID = '[batchID]' and v.Broker = 1
update TransX set ReinName = 'UNKNOWN' from TransX inner join [GFS].dbo.FSGValidation on GL = GLAccount where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Cedant = 1
update TransX set TransCode = 'T9999' from TransX inner join [GFS].dbo.FSGValidation v on GL = GLAccount where KeyID = '[batchID]' and v.TransCode = 1
update TransX set TTY = '990' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '%98' or GL like '35%'
update TransX set TTY = '991' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '%96' or GL like '4398%'
update TransX set PK = '40' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt3 > 0
update TransX set PK = '50' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt3 < 0

sqlSelect.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, Crcy, GL, Amt3) values ('[batchID]',
